text: A partially ordered set consists of a set \(P\) and a binary relation \(\le\) on \(P\) that is transitive, reflexive and antisymmetric.
html: • A partially ordered set consists of a set \(P\) and a binary relation \(\le\) on \(P\) that is transitive, reflexive and antisymmetric.
zh: partially ordered set由一个集合 \(P\) 以及 \(P\) 上的二元关系 \(\le\) 组成，该关系满足传递性、自反性和反对称性。

text: A group consists of a set \(G\) with an associative binary operation, an identity element \(1\) , and a function \(g \mapsto g^{-1}\) that returns an inverse for each \(g\) in \(G\) . A group is abelian or commutative if the operation is commutative.
html: • A group consists of a set \(G\) with an associative binary operation, an identity element \(1\), and a function \(g \mapsto g^{-1}\) that returns an inverse for each \(g\) in \(G\). A group is abelian or commutative if the operation is commutative.
zh: group由一个集合 \(G\)、一个结合的二元运算、一个单位元 \(1\)，以及一个函数 \(g \mapsto g^{-1}\) 组成；该函数为 \(G\) 中每个 \(g\) 返回一个逆元。若运算可交换，则群称为abelian或commutative。

text: A lattice is a partially ordered set with meets and joins.
html: • A lattice is a partially ordered set with meets and joins.
zh: lattice是带有交和并的偏序集。

text: A ring consists of an (additively written) abelian group \((R, +, 0, x \mapsto -x)\) together with an associative multiplication operation \(\cdot\) and an identity \(1\) , such that multiplication distributes over addition. A ring is commutative if the multiplication is commutative.
html: • A ring consists of an (additively written) abelian group \((R, +, 0, x \mapsto -x)\) together with an associative multiplication operation \(\cdot\) and an identity \(1\), such that multiplication distributes over addition. A ring is commutative if the multiplication is commutative.
zh: ring由一个（以加法方式书写的）阿贝尔群 \((R, +, 0, x \mapsto -x)\)，连同一个结合的乘法运算 \(\cdot\) 和单位元 \(1\) 组成，并且乘法对加法满足分配律。若乘法可交换，则环称为commutative环。

text: An ordered ring \((R, +, 0, -, \cdot, 1, \le)\) consists of a ring together with a partial order on its elements, such that \(a \le b\) implies \(a + c \le b + c\) for every \(a\) , \(b\) , and \(c\) in \(R\) , and \(0 \le a\) and \(0 \le b\) implies \(0 \le a b\) for every \(a\) and \(b\) in \(R\) .
html: • An ordered ring \((R, +, 0, -, \cdot, 1, \le)\) consists of a ring together with a partial order on its elements, such that \(a \le b\) implies \(a + c \le b + c\) for every \(a\), \(b\), and \(c\) in \(R\), and \(0 \le a\) and \(0 \le b\) implies \(0 \le a b\) for every \(a\) and \(b\) in \(R\).
zh: ordered ring \((R, +, 0, -, \cdot, 1, \le)\) 由一个环连同其元素上的偏序组成，使得对 \(R\) 中任意 \(a\)、\(b\) 和 \(c\)，若 \(a \le b\)，则 \(a + c \le b + c\)；并且对 \(R\) 中任意 \(a\) 和 \(b\)，若 \(0 \le a\) 且 \(0 \le b\)，则 \(0 \le a b\)。

text: A metric space consists of a set \(X\) and a function \(d : X \times X \to \mathbb{R}\) such that the following hold: \(d(x, y) \ge 0\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\) . \(d(x, y) = 0\) if and only if \(x = y\) . \(d(x, y) = d(y, x)\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\) . \(d(x, z) \le d(x, y) + d(y, z)\) for every \(x\) , \(y\) , and \(z\) in \(X\) .
html:
• A metric space consists of a set \(X\) and a function \(d : X \times X \to \mathbb{R}\) such that the following hold:

    • \(d(x, y) \ge 0\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\).

    • \(d(x, y) = 0\) if and only if \(x = y\).

    • \(d(x, y) = d(y, x)\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\).

    • \(d(x, z) \le d(x, y) + d(y, z)\) for every \(x\), \(y\), and \(z\) in \(X\).
zh: metric space由一个集合 \(X\) 和函数 \(d : X \times X \to \mathbb{R}\) 组成，满足如下性质：对 \(X\) 中任意 \(x\) 和 \(y\)，有 \(d(x, y) \ge 0\)。\(d(x, y) = 0\) 当且仅当 \(x = y\)。对 \(X\) 中任意 \(x\) 和 \(y\)，有 \(d(x, y) = d(y, x)\)。对 \(X\) 中任意 \(x\)、\(y\) 和 \(z\)，有 \(d(x, z) \le d(x, y) + d(y, z)\)。

text: \(d(x, y) \ge 0\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\) .
html: • \(d(x, y) \ge 0\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\).
zh: 对 \(X\) 中任意 \(x\) 和 \(y\)，有 \(d(x, y) \ge 0\)。

text: \(d(x, y) = 0\) if and only if \(x = y\) .
html: • \(d(x, y) = 0\) if and only if \(x = y\).
zh: \(d(x, y) = 0\) 当且仅当 \(x = y\)。

text: \(d(x, y) = d(y, x)\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\) .
html: • \(d(x, y) = d(y, x)\) for every \(x\) and \(y\) in \(X\).
zh: 对 \(X\) 中任意 \(x\) 和 \(y\)，有 \(d(x, y) = d(y, x)\)。

text: \(d(x, z) \le d(x, y) + d(y, z)\) for every \(x\) , \(y\) , and \(z\) in \(X\) .
html: • \(d(x, z) \le d(x, y) + d(y, z)\) for every \(x\), \(y\), and \(z\) in \(X\).
zh: 对 \(X\) 中任意 \(x\)、\(y\) 和 \(z\)，有 \(d(x, z) \le d(x, y) + d(y, z)\)。

text: A topological space consists of a set \(X\) and a collection \(\mathcal T\) of subsets of \(X\) , called the open subsets of \(X\) , such that the following hold: The empty set and \(X\) are open. The intersection of two open sets is open. An arbitrary union of open sets is open.
html:
• A topological space consists of a set \(X\) and a collection \(\mathcal T\) of subsets of \(X\), called the open subsets of \(X\), such that the following hold:

    • The empty set and \(X\) are open.

    • The intersection of two open sets is open.

    • An arbitrary union of open sets is open.
zh: topological space由一个集合 \(X\) 和 \(X\) 的子集族 \(\mathcal T\) 组成，后者称为 \(X\) 的open subsets of，并满足如下性质：空集和 \(X\) 是开集。两个开集的交是开集。任意开集族的并是开集。

text: The empty set and \(X\) are open.
html: • The empty set and \(X\) are open.
zh: 空集和 \(X\) 是开集。

text: The intersection of two open sets is open.
html: • The intersection of two open sets is open.
zh: 两个开集的交是开集。

text: An arbitrary union of open sets is open.
html: • An arbitrary union of open sets is open.
zh: 任意开集族的并是开集。

text: Logic. A definition that should be interpreted in any group takes, as arguments, the type of the group and the group structure as arguments. Similarly, a theorem about the elements of an arbitrary group begins with universal quantifiers over the type of the group and the group structure.
html: • Logic. A definition that should be interpreted in any group takes, as arguments, the type of the group and the group structure as arguments. Similarly, a theorem about the elements of an arbitrary group begins with universal quantifiers over the type of the group and the group structure.
zh: 逻辑。应在任意群中解释的定义，把群的类型和群结构作为参数。类似地，关于任意群元素的定理，以对群的类型和群结构的全称量词开头。

text: Implicit arguments. The arguments for the type and the structure are generally left implicit, so that we do not have to write them or see them in the Lean information window. Lean fills the information in for us silently.
html: • Implicit arguments. The arguments for the type and the structure are generally left implicit, so that we do not have to write them or see them in the Lean information window. Lean fills the information in for us silently.
zh: 隐式参数。类型参数和结构参数通常留作隐式参数，这样我们既不必书写它们，也不必在 Lean 信息窗口中看到它们。Lean 会在幕后为我们填充这些信息。

text: Type class inference. Also known as class inference , this is a simple but powerful mechanism that enables us to register information for Lean to use later on. When Lean is called on to fill in implicit arguments to a definition, theorem, or piece of notation, it can make use of information that has been registered.
html: • Type class inference. Also known as class inference, this is a simple but powerful mechanism that enables us to register information for Lean to use later on. When Lean is called on to fill in implicit arguments to a definition, theorem, or piece of notation, it can make use of information that has been registered.
zh: 类型类推断。又称class inference，这是一种简单但强大的机制，使我们能够注册信息供 Lean 稍后使用。当 Lean 被要求为定义、定理或记号片段填充隐式参数时，它可以利用已经注册的信息。

text: For every \(a\) and \(b \ne 0\) in \(R\) , there are \(q\) and \(r\) in \(R\) such that \(a = bq + r\) and either \(r = 0\) or \(N(r) < N(b)\) .
html: • For every \(a\) and \(b \ne 0\) in \(R\), there are \(q\) and \(r\) in \(R\) such that \(a = bq + r\) and either \(r = 0\) or \(N(r) < N(b)\).
zh: 对 \(R\) 中每个 \(a\) 和 \(b \ne 0\)，存在 \(R\) 中的 \(q\) 和 \(r\)，使得 \(a = bq + r\)，并且要么 \(r = 0\)，要么 \(N(r) < N(b)\)。

text: For every \(a\) and \(b \ne 0\) , \(N(a) \le N(ab)\) .
html: • For every \(a\) and \(b \ne 0\), \(N(a) \le N(ab)\).
zh: 对每个 \(a\) 和 \(b \ne 0\)，有 \(N(a) \le N(ab)\)。
